tasks.subject: Task 0: index.html SEO Fixes
tasks.description: **Goal:** Apply all technical SEO improvements to index.html and add .app-title-sub CSS to style.css. **Files:** - Modify: `index.html` - Modify: `style.css` **Acceptance Criteria:** - [ ] H1 ends with ` — PDF schneiden im Browser` - [ ] `.app-title-sub` defined in style.css with `display: block` - [ ] `` present in head - [ ] `` present - [ ] Two hreflang tags (de + x-default) present - [ ] FAQPage JSON-LD with 5 questions present - [ ] WebSite JSON-LD present - [ ] Internal links to etiketten/ and poster/ in use-case list **Verify:** `open index.html` → Rechtsklick → Seitenquelltext → prüfen: `og:image:alt`, `hreflang`, `FAQPage`, `WebSite`, Links ```json:metadata {"files": ["index.html", "style.css"], "verifyCommand": "open index.html", "acceptanceCriteria": ["H1 contains PDF schneiden im Browser", "og:image:alt present", "apple-touch-icon present", "hreflang de and x-default present", "FAQPage JSON-LD present with 5 questions", "WebSite JSON-LD present", "Links to etiketten/ and poster/ present"], "modelTier": "standard"} ```

tasks.subject: Task 1: /etiketten/ Landing Page
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create etiketten/index.html — a standalone SEO landing page for the shipping labels use case.

**Files:**
- Create: `etiketten/index.html`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] H1: "Versandetiketten aus A4-PDF freistellen"
- [ ] Title contains "DHL/DPD/Hermes" and "cutpdf.app"
- [ ] Canonical: https://cutpdf.fieber-it.com/etiketten/
- [ ] FAQPage JSON-LD with 5 questions present
- [ ] WebPage JSON-LD with isPartOf present
- [ ] Steps include 100x150 mm setting
- [ ] CTA links to ../
- [ ] Relative paths ../style.css and ../favicon.svg used
- [ ] Page renders correctly in browser

**Verify:** `open etiketten/index.html` → check layout → Seitenquelltext → confirm canonical and both JSON-LD blocks

```json:metadata
{"files": ["etiketten/index.html"], "verifyCommand": "open etiketten/index.html", "acceptanceCriteria": ["H1 is Versandetiketten aus A4-PDF freistellen", "Canonical is https://cutpdf.fieber-it.com/etiketten/", "FAQPage JSON-LD present", "WebPage JSON-LD with isPartOf present", "Page renders without broken CSS"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: /poster/ Landing Page
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create poster/index.html — a standalone SEO landing page for the poster/large format printing use case.

**Files:**
- Create: `poster/index.html`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] H1: "PDF als Poster auf mehrere A4-Seiten aufteilen"
- [ ] Title contains "Poster" and "cutpdf.app"
- [ ] Canonical: https://cutpdf.fieber-it.com/poster/
- [ ] FAQPage JSON-LD with 5 questions (incl. size calculation and overlap)
- [ ] WebPage JSON-LD with isPartOf present
- [ ] Steps mention Überlappung in Erweitert
- [ ] CTA links to ../
- [ ] Relative paths ../style.css and ../favicon.svg used
- [ ] Page renders correctly in browser

**Verify:** `open poster/index.html` → check layout → Seitenquelltext → confirm canonical and both JSON-LD blocks

```json:metadata
{"files": ["poster/index.html"], "verifyCommand": "open poster/index.html", "acceptanceCriteria": ["H1 is PDF als Poster auf mehrere A4-Seiten aufteilen", "Canonical is https://cutpdf.fieber-it.com/poster/", "FAQPage JSON-LD present", "WebPage JSON-LD with isPartOf present", "Page renders without broken CSS"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Sitemap Update + Push
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add /etiketten/ and /poster/ to sitemap.xml, validate XML, push all commits.

**Files:**
- Modify: `sitemap.xml`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] https://cutpdf.fieber-it.com/etiketten/ present in sitemap.xml
- [ ] https://cutpdf.fieber-it.com/poster/ present in sitemap.xml
- [ ] xmllint --noout sitemap.xml exits 0
- [ ] All commits pushed to origin/main

**Verify:** `xmllint --noout sitemap.xml && echo "valid"` → output: `valid`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["sitemap.xml"], "verifyCommand": "xmllint --noout sitemap.xml && echo valid", "acceptanceCriteria": ["etiketten/ URL in sitemap", "poster/ URL in sitemap", "xmllint exits 0", "git push succeeds"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```
